Those tickets item can be acquired when you get high rank from either traphase or pdive
Then you use it to get rng icon or emote for traphase
If it's a dupe it convert to another ticket
After collecting 5 of that new ticket you can use it as select icon or emote
This ticket from traphase or pdive ranking
If you dupe the emote or icon you already own you'll get this one
Also the 1st ticket can also be acquired through dtide
